categories.title: Strategy & Vision
categories.definition: Clarity, coherence, and alignment of strategic direction across the enterprise.

subcategories.title: Strategic Clarity
subcategories.definition: How clearly the strategy is defined and communicated.

children.title: Vision Statement
children.definition: Existence and quality of an articulated vision.

subcategories.title: Market Positioning
subcategories.definition: Clarity of competitive positioning and differentiation.

categories.title: Operations & Execution
categories.definition: Operational excellence and reliable delivery against plan.

subcategories.title: Process Maturity
subcategories.definition: Maturity and repeatability of core operating processes.

subcategories.title: Quality Management
subcategories.definition: Systems that assure and improve quality.
